.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target JDK version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using it would cause build failures.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven via apk instead of relying on the base image's pre-installed Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image does not include Maven, so it must be explicitly installed to build the project.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource apt repository script.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource apt script is incompatible with Alpine Linux; nvm is a portable alternative required to run frontend tooling.
Dockerfile.before: RUN apt-get install -y curl && curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_12.x | bash - && apt-get install -y nodejs
Dockerfile.after:
ENV NODE_VERSION=16.20.0
RUN apk add curl
RUN apk add bash
RUN curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.0/install.sh | bash
ENV NVM_DIR=/root/.nvm
RUN . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm install ${NODE_VERSION}

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add build steps to copy source code and run Maven package command.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile only set up the environment without building the application; the new intent is to produce a runnable JAR.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app
RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint to run the generated JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous CMD was a placeholder shell; the new intent is to run the application.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the explicit framework configuration for react-webpack5, which is required in newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to compatibility issues or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: const WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning = require("./webpack-plugin-fail-build-on-warning"); ... webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the host.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor parameters export to use the modern Storybook preview object format.
Add mswLoader to the preview loaders array to enable MSW in stories.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x due to dependency conflicts and API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); if code still references javax.validation, it will fail at runtime or compile time without this bridge or code update.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update frontend-maven-plugin Node.js version from v12 to v16 in production profile.
pom.xml.why_exists: Node.js 12 is EOL and may not support modern frontend tooling required by the project; updating ensures build stability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add wiremock and integration profiles to pom.xml for better testing environment management.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to pom.xml.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for service virtualization in tests.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and explicit section markers for readability.
Update artifact ID from 'kitchensink' to 'team03' to reflect project identity.
Update project description to reflect new purpose.
Add mainClass property and configure maven-jar-plugin and spring-boot-maven-plugin to use it.
Update Jacoco plugin configuration to exclude new package paths and classes.
Add maven-surefire-plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
